I agree with my colleague's selection of option C. The key roles of alkaline phosphatase and pyrophosphatase align well with their functions described earlier—alkaline phosphatase supports bone formation through mineralization pathways, whereas pyrophosphatase helps manage calcium homeostasis by preventing crystal precipitation during calcification processes. This makes them crucial players in these physiological mechanisms.
